title: Volunteering
subtitle: Find opportunities, track your hours, and keep your applications moving.
ownerOpportunityHint: You manage this opportunity, so volunteer applications are handled from the organiser tools.
noDescription: No description has been added yet.
coverMessageHint: Add a short note for the organiser.
coverMessagePlaceholder: Tell the organiser why you are interested…
applicationSubmittedHint: The organiser can now review your application.
applyError: Could not apply for this opportunity.
signInRequiredMessage: Sign in to apply for volunteering opportunities.
logHoursHint: Choose an organisation and add the hours you contributed today.
noLoggableOrganisations: You do not have an approved organisation or application to log hours against yet.
hoursRequired: Choose an organisation and enter a valid number of hours.
shiftSignupMessage: You have signed up for this shift.
shiftSignupError: Could not sign up for this shift.
interestSentMessage: The organisation will be in touch with you soon.

create.title: Create Opportunity
create.subtitle: Publish a volunteer role for an organisation you manage.
create.noOrganisations: You need an approved organisation before posting opportunities.
create.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the role, support, and expected impact.
create.reviewSubtitle: Check the organisation, dates, location, and skills before posting.
create.validationRequired: Choose an organisation and add a title and description.
create.validationTitleMinLength: Use at least 5 characters for the title.
create.validationDescriptionMinLength: Use at least 20 characters for the description.
create.validationEndAfterStart: Use an end date after the start date.
create.failedDescription: We could not create the opportunity. Please try again.
